title: Academic Clara Adams Honors College
content:
The Clara I. Adams Honors College
The Clara I. Adams Honors College recruits, retains, and empowers high-achieving students from Maryland and beyond, helping them graduate with a strong academic and leadership foundation. The college supports students' personal development, service leadership, and academic growth beyond the classroom. This aligns with Morgan State University's commitment to "Growing the Future, Leading the World."

For more information, visit the Clara I. Adams Honors College website.
